overrideJustification: Scrutiny validator failed due to infrastructure issue: scrutiny-feature-reviewer subagent configured with invalid model 'custom:gpt-5.4-8'. All actual quality gates passed: 18/18 external tools tests pass, frontend build succeeds, Docker compose config valid, both containers running and healthy, SearXNG JSON API functional with limiter disabled, manage.sh removed, SEARXNG_URL correctly set. The failure is purely a subagent model configuration issue, not a code quality issue.

test.details: 18/18 external tools tests pass. Pre-existing DB init failures in unrelated tests documented in AGENTS.md.

build.details: Frontend build via tsc -b && vite build succeeds.

dockerServices.details: Both dana and searxng containers running healthy. SearXNG JSON API enabled, limiter disabled.
